King Rice Bowl Korean Restaurant

King Rice Bowl Korean Rice Bowls (King Rice Bowl Hánshì Dòngfàn)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4
📍 Zhongshan District, Taipei City📅 2026
Korean Korean Bowl Jajangmyeon Korean Cuisine
Tucked away in the narrow alleys of Taipei’s Zhongshan District, King Rice Bowl (킹덮밥 한식당) is a total hidden gem on Chang’an East Road. Located right near the bustling Zhongshan "2.0" food street, this cozy spot is run by a mostly Korean staff serving up authentic, home-style comfort food. It’s the kind of place that has built a massive local following strictly through word-of-mouth thanks to its legit flavors and super fair prices. The name "Deopbap" literally means Korean rice bowl, and their signatures like the Garlic Soy Beef, Spicy Stir-fried Pork, and Teriyaki Chicken bowls are absolute must-tries. If you’re looking to branch out, they’ve got a solid lineup including Jajangmyeon (black bean noodles), refreshing cold noodles, Spicy Soft Tofu Stew, and Kimchi Cheese Fried Rice. You also won't want to miss the Mozzarella Potato Pancake or the massive Jokbal (braised pig's trotters) which is plenty for a group of 3-4. Every meal comes with four types of "Banchan"—classic Korean side dishes like kimchi, spicy fish cakes, and pickled radish—and the best part? They’re unlimited! Just a heads-up: they only take walk-ins, so no phone or online reservations, though takeout is an option. Seating is a bit limited, making it a great spot for a quick bite or a casual sit-down. Perfect for solo diners, small groups of friends, and families who love Korean food.
Good for Solo diners Small groups of friends Families who love Korean food

What I ordered

Korean Black Bean Sauce Noodles (Jajangmyeon) Korean Black Bean Sauce Udon Garlic Soy Glazed Beef Donburi Korean Spicy Stir-fried Pork Donburi (Jeyuk-deopbap) Chicken Teriyaki Donburi Assorted Side Dishes (Kimchi, Spicy Stir-fried Fish Cakes, Pickled Radish)

Dishes

Restaurant info

Address 1F, No. 7, Ln. 129, Sec. 2, Chang'an E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan Open in Google Maps →
Hours11:00-14:30 (last order 14:00)/ 17:00-20:30 (last order 20:00)
ReservationsWalk-in only (in-store ordering only, no phone or online reservations)
ServiceFour side dishes with free refills, takeout available
PriceNT$ 150-350 / person
CuisineKorean・Korean Bowl・Jajangmyeon・Korean Cuisine
